newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. AutoStore's last disclosure was Q1 2026 results on April 23 (revenue $165.8M, order intake $179.4M, record backlog $570.6M, 72.7% gross margin), and it launched CubeVerse cloud/AI software earlier in the quarter — both already known at the June 9 case. Stock drifted +5.6% on no new evidence.

verdicts.rankRationale: No new AI-orchestration or order evidence since June 9; Q1 (Apr 23) and CubeVerse were already known. The +5.6% drift is price, not thesis. Robotic cube-storage latent-node case unchanged versus warehouse-automation peers; hold rank.
verdicts.bull: Record $571M backlog with 2027 shipments and CubeVerse AI software lift the latent-orchestration value.
verdicts.neutral: High-margin executor but cyclical warehouse demand; thesis intact, no fresh catalyst.
verdicts.bear: Intense robotics competition and a derated multiple; +5.6% pop on no new data.
